$comment: Fleetpass beta-trial prestart template. This is an ORIGINAL Fleetpass checklist, not a digitisation of Northern Star NSR229 or Gold Fields Rev 1 — we never got the real item-by-item lists for either, just their structure (A/B/C-by-consequence, a Functional & Operational group outside that hierarchy, a FIRE HAZARDS sub-heading, and a fail-note column). This template borrows that structure with generic, standard light-vehicle daily-check items so there's a real, usable book to launch the beta with. `updatedAt` is intentionally omitted — the seed/import script stamps it with a Firestore server timestamp on write, since static JSON has no Timestamp type.
name: Fleetpass Beta Trial — Light Vehicle Prestart

items.label: Fire extinguisher fitted, charged, and within service date
No visible fuel, oil, or other fluid leaks
Tyres — condition, tread depth, and pressure all satisfactory
Wheel nuts secure and rims undamaged
Service brakes operate effectively
Park brake holds the vehicle
Steering operates without excessive play or noise
Seatbelts fitted, functional, and undamaged — all seating positions
Windscreen free of cracks or damage obstructing the driver's view
Isolation switch / battery isolator operates correctly
Head, tail, brake, and indicator lights all operate
Horn operates
Windscreen wipers and washers operate
All mirrors fitted, unbroken, and correctly adjusted
Reverse alarm / beeper operates (if fitted)
Air conditioning / cabin ventilation operates
Wheel chocks present and serviceable
First aid kit present and stocked
Spare tyre present and serviceable
Vehicle interior and exterior reasonably clean and free of rubbish
UHF / two-way radio operates
Load restraints / tie-down points in good condition (if fitted)
Other faults or comments (describe)
Fuel level (%)
Engine oil level satisfactory
Coolant level satisfactory
Dash warning lights — none illuminated at startup
